title: Base UI shell
description: Set up shared layout, navigation, and role-based routing skeleton so feature pages can be added incrementally.

subtasks.title: Root layout + global styles
subtasks.description: Set up app/layout.js with TailwindCSS globals, fonts, and a basic responsive shell.

subtasks.title: Placeholder route folders
subtasks.description: Create empty route folders for /login, /register, /passenger, /driver, /admin so structure exists before features are built.
